name: verdanthor

identity.scales: iridescent emerald and jade scales with faint golden filigree along the jaw and spine ridges
identity.eyes: large amber eyes with vertical slit pupils, faintly glowing from within
identity.horns: swept-back crystalline horns that refract light into rainbow flecks
identity.wings: translucent membranous wings with visible emerald veining, folded or spread depending on scene

core: Same dragon in every image. An ancient sage forest dragon with iridescent emerald scales, golden filigree ridges, large glowing amber slit-pupil eyes, crystalline swept-back horns, and translucent veined wings. Massive yet graceful, exuding calm intelligence.
style: Painterly digital art, warm cinematic lighting, atmospheric depth, rich natural environments.
negative: cartoon, chibi, anime, photo-realistic human skin, text overlays, watermarks, low resolution, flat lighting, plastic toys
